dep.name: @opencode-ai/plugin
dep.purpose: Type-safe OpenCode plugin API, hooks, config mutation, and custom tool helper.

dep.name: @opencode-ai/sdk
dep.purpose: OpenCode client types and runtime interactions used by Guardian and plugin logging.

dep.name: citty
dep.purpose: CLI command tree and argument parsing for `vvoc`.

dep.name: jsonc-parser
dep.purpose: Safe JSONC-aware config parsing for vvoc-managed config files and OpenCode config edits.

dep.name: @clack/prompts
dep.purpose: TTY prompts for interactive init command with Ctrl+C handling and cross-shell support.

constraint.reason: The package and local verification target Bun-based runtime and test execution.
Config-hook based role resolution plus Guardian and Memory depend on the current plugin hook API shape.
Guardian uses current SDK message, part, and client log types.

ConfigLayout.openCode: OpenCode config remains in `opencode.json(c)` or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode/`. OpenCode model-bearing fields may store `vv-role:*` references in `model`, `small_model`, `agent.*.model`, and `command.*.model`, and those references are resolved at runtime by the vvoc role plugin.
ConfigLayout.vvoc: vvoc-managed settings live only in the canonical `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/vvoc/vvoc.json` file. The canonical config now owns built-in and custom role assignments, role presets, Guardian settings, Memory settings, and Secrets Redaction settings. Project-local `.vvoc/` is reserved for managed prompt files.
ConfigLayout.memory: Persistent explicit memory settings live in the `memory` section of `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/vvoc/vvoc.json`. Session, branch, and project data live under `$XDG_DATA_HOME/vvoc/projects/<project-id>/memory/`, while shared data lives under `$XDG_DATA_HOME/vvoc/memory/shared/<namespace>/`.

module-level.command: bun test src/lib/opencode.test.ts src/lib/model-roles.test.ts src/plugins/model-roles.test.ts src/plugins/memory.test.ts
module-level.focus: Fast deterministic checks for role parsing, `vv-role:*` resolution, canonical vvoc v3 layout, managed agent registration, role preset application, Guardian/Memory built-in role wiring, and memory CRUD.

wave-level.focus: Checks merged CLI and plugin behavior with lint and format verification included.

phase-level.command: bun run check && bun run build
phase-level.focus: Validates package output and regression-safe baseline behavior after quality gates pass, including role-driven startup resolution and role-centric CLI workflows.

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer direct pure-function verification and fixture text over broad mocks.

Observability.logger: OpenCode app log via `client.app.log()` plus Guardian best-effort debug file in `/tmp`.
Observability.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, or raw high-risk payloads beyond the existing Guardian truncation policy.

DeliveryShape.shape: One public npm package that exports `GuardianPlugin`, `MemoryPlugin`, `SystemContextInjectionPlugin`, `SecretsRedactionPlugin`, and `ModelRolesPlugin`, plus a Bun CLI binary named `vvoc`.
